formulas.formula:
=ARRAYFORMULA(IF(AK7:AK="No","",IFNA(TO_DATE(IFERROR(VLOOKUP(B7:B&C7:C,SORT({'Confirmation From Client'!B:B&'Confirmation From Client'!C:C,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A},2,FALSE),3,false),IFERROR(VLOOKUP(C7:C,SORT({'Confirmation From Client'!C:C,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A},2,FALSE),3,FALSE)))
))))

=ARRAYFORMULA(IF(B7:B="","",IFERROR(VLOOKUP(B7:B&C7:C,{'Confirmation From Client'!B:B&'Confirmation From Client'!C:C,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A,'Confirmation From Client'!D:H },{3,4,5,6,7},FALSE),IFERROR(VLOOKUP(B7:B,{'Confirmation From Client'!B:B,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A,'Confirmation From Client'!D:H},{3,4,5,6,7},FALSE),IFERROR(VLOOKUP(C7:C,{'Confirmation From Client'!C:C,'Confirmation From Client'!A:A,'Confirmation From Client'!D:H},{3,4,5,6,7},FALSE),"")))))

formulas.formula:
=ARRAYFORMULA(
IF(D3:D=J3, "Anish Agrawal",
IF(D3:D=J4, "Prithwish Dutta",
IF(D3:D=J6, "Vartika Mishra",
IF(D3:D=J8, "Anish Agrawal",
IF(D3:D=J9,
   IFNA(VLOOKUP(B3:B, {'Story Briefing'!C:C,'Story Briefing'!S:S}, 2, 0)),
IF(D3:D=J10,
   IFNA(VLOOKUP(B3:B, {'Moodboard Creation'!C:C,'Moodboard Creation'!N:N}, 2, 0)),
   IFERROR(VLOOKUP(B3:B, {FMS!B:B, FMS!AE:AE}, 2, 0))
)))))))
formulas.description: Anish Agrawal

formulas.formula:
=ARRAYFORMULA(IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{Orders!B:B&"Take Advance",Orders!AD:AD},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Assign Operation Executive",FMS!AD:AD},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Confirmation From Client",FMS!AH:AH},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Photographer Allotment",FMS!AP:AP},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Photographer Briefing",FMS!BW:BW},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Make Token Payment To Photographer",FMS!CF:CF},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Pre-Shoot Briefing Provided by Client (Moodboard Disscussion)",FMS!CP:CP},2,FALSE),
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Moodboard Creation & Development",FMS!DH:DH},2,FALSE),  
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Moodboard Delivery to Client",FMS!DU:DU},2,FALSE),  
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Client Briefing Before Shoot",FMS!EH:EH},2,FALSE),   
              IFERROR(VLOOKUP(A2:A&C2:C,{FMS!B:B&"Photographer Briefing Before Shoot",FMS!EQ:EQ},2,FALSE),       
)))         )))))))))

headers: ITS OPERATION EXECUTIVE IS SAME AS SALES EXEECUTIVE.
1.) Where Client Type is - MMT2 , automation assign the Kiran Patel

Initial Order Placement.description: Orders are recorded initially in the 'Orders' sheet with details such as client information, job details, and financial specifics.

Management Approval.description: Management approval is given for orders that require it, and relevant details are updated back in the 'Orders' sheet.

Advance Payment Handling.description: Handles the financial part of orders, storing data about the advance requested and received. Links back to the 'Orders' sheet to update advance statuses.

Story Briefing.description: Client requirements and vision are captured and updated for creative briefing and execution.

Moodboard Creation and Delivery.description: Moodboards are created based on briefings and delivered. Updates made in 'FMS' for project status.

Token Payment.description: Financial records of token payments are maintained and reconciled with the 'Orders' sheet.

Photographer Allotment and Briefing.description: Assigns photographers for jobs and manages their briefings. Updates referenced in 'FMS' for logistics purposes.

Final Approvals and Confirmation.description: Once all requirements are met, final approval is given, and this status updates the main job sheet.

Payment Processing.description: Records and processes various payment milestones and statuses across projects.

Orders.Planned and Actual Dates: Uses WORKDAY.INTL and VLOOKUP to calculate and verify planned and actual event timelines.
Orders.Advance Calculations: Calculates advance required percentages and status using ARRAYFORMULA.

FMS.Photographer Allotments and Time Delays: Manages planned times and captures delays using WORKDAY.INTL and ARRAYFORMULA.
FMS.Detailed Linking: Integrates data from several workflows to ensure all aspects tied back to FMS.

Management Approval.VLOOKUP Utilization: Looks up data for approvals and denials to streamline approval statuses.

Photographer Search & Allotments.VLOOKUP and IFNA Functions: Checks available photographers and assigns verified personnel.

Updates for Merged Processes.QUERY Functions: Generates timelines and assigns task-specific data, and alters statuses across workflows.

Management Approval.role: Captures details of management's decision on project approvals.

Take advance.role: Records details of advance payments requested and completed.

columns: Story Briefing From Client Form Submitted by
Story Briefing.role: Captures client briefing details for shoot styling, themes, and expectations.

Moodboard Delivery.role: Tracks creation and delivery status of moodboards.
